emotional_tone: Modern, bright, cutting-edge, vibrant, fast, clinical-clean with energetic spikes

layout.spacing_system: Generous Spacing (p-6, p-8, p-12) for containers with internal padding. Mobile images max-h-[80vh].

grid_modes.marketing: MODE A (Tetris Grid) - Asymmetry, gap-8 to gap-12. Never fill 100% perfectly, leave negative space.
grid_modes.dashboard: MODE B (Control Room Grid) - Density, gap-4 to gap-6. Every pixel utilized, h-full on children.

cards.style: Flat background (bg-white), crisp 1px border (border-black/10), no soft/muddy shadows. Sharp corners (rounded-none or max rounded-sm).
cards.hover: Slight lift (-translate-y-1), crisp neon shadow (e.g. shadow-[4px_4px_0px_#CCFF00] or shadow-[0_0_15px_rgba(204,255,0,0.5)]) and black border.

buttons.primary: bg-[#0A0A0A] text-white hover:bg-[#CCFF00] hover:text-[#0A0A0A] transition-colors rounded-none px-6 py-3 font-bold uppercase tracking-widest
buttons.secondary: bg-transparent border border-[#0A0A0A] text-[#0A0A0A] hover:bg-[#0A0A0A] hover:text-white transition-colors rounded-none px-6 py-3 font-bold uppercase tracking-widest

glassmorphism.style: High-opacity Crystal Glass: bg-white/80 backdrop-blur-xl border-b border-black/10 shadow-sm (use for sticky headers and bottom nav)

hero_background.description: Bright futuristic cafe interior for landing page hero or auth background.

abstract_accent.description: Translucent glass cubes and neon accents for subtle page backgrounds or banners.

food_sample.description: Futuristic high-contrast burger image for menu placeholder or promotional spotlight.

cafe_interior.description: Bright modern café interior with white tiles for about section or restaurant listings.

testing.attributes: All interactive elements MUST include a descriptive data-testid attribute (e.g., data-testid='add-to-cart-btn', data-testid='order-status-card', data-testid='accept-order-btn').

instructions_to_main_agent: Strictly follow the 'Vibrant High-Contrast Light' aesthetic. NO dark mode.
Do NOT use pure #000000 or #808080. Use tinted #0A0A0A for blacks and primary text.
Buttons and cards should lean toward sharp edges (rounded-none or rounded-sm) with strong black borders or typography. Avoid default soft Shadcn radii.
Implement the 'Tetris' Grid for the marketing/landing page, mixing large images with typography blocks. Leave negative space.
Implement the 'Control Room' Grid for the Admin Dashboard (dense, gap-4 to gap-6, 1px borders, white backgrounds).
Use Shadcn UI for forms, inputs, tables, and dialogs, but strip out the soft Vercel shadows. Replace them with crisp 1px borders and high-contrast hover states. Do NOT use HTML select/date.
For the mobile menu view: prioritize mobile-first layout. Use bottom navigation, large swipeable category tabs, and highly visible 'Add to cart' buttons with neon accents.
Ensure generous spacing: Containers with borders must have p-6 or p-8 padding. Use p-12 or p-16 for major sections.
Never use placeholder URLs (via.placeholder.com). Use ONLY the provided media image URLs from this JSON.
Apply backdrop-blur-xl and bg-white/80 to sticky headers and mobile bottom navbars to create 'Crystal Glass'.
Add 'data-testid' to every interactive element (buttons, links, form inputs) to ensure robust testing.
